name: Weeknight Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef and onion in a large skillet over medium heat until the meat is browned and crumbles when stirred.
2. Drain excess fat from the skillet.
3. Stir in the tomato soup and enchilada sauce.
4. Spread about 1/4 cup of the meat mixture onto each tortilla.
5. Sprinkle the tortillas evenly with 1 cup shredded cheese.
6. Roll up the tortillas, seam side down, and place them in a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
7. Pour the remaining meat mixture over the tortillas.
8. Cover the dish and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
9. Uncover and sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
10. Bake an additional 5 minutes or until the cheese melts.
